code_boss.source: Last War: Survival community guide - Code Boss Coordination
code_boss.note: Code Boss events occur 3 times during Season 2. Each boss has a troop type that deals 50% more damage. Marshall is mandatory in all squads — no buffs = no real damage. Max 3 attacks per day for rewards.

Code_87.name: Code 87
gear_priority: Then gear Stateman, followed by Mason
DVA only gets cannon gear if surplus remains
Marshall must have full defense gear
notes: DVA can be replaced by your best DPS hero
Mason's 'Zombie Cleaner' skill should be level 20

Code_39.name: Code 39
gear_priority: DVA gets the best attack gear
Marshall stays frontline with defense gear
notes: If Skyler/Morrison are unavailable or weak, Stateman/Mason is a solid substitute

no_missile_squad_alternative.note: If you don't have a Missile squad, use your top 4 damage dealers
no_missile_squad_alternative.mandatory: Marshall is mandatory in all Code Boss squads — no buffs = no real damage

universal_rules: Marshall is mandatory in ALL Code Boss squads — his buffs are essential for damage output
Always match your troop type to the boss type for +50% damage bonus
Max 3 attacks per day for rewards (not 5 like Wanted Monsters)
Use War Fever before every attack for additional power boost
Attack AFTER Hero Advancement phase of Arms Race for maximum power
3 Code Boss events occur during Season 2

gear_strategy.principle: Concentrate best gear on your primary damage dealer, not spread evenly
gear_strategy.aircraft_boss: DVA gets best attack gear first
gear_strategy.missile_boss: Follow squad DPS order: Tesla/Swift prioritised
